name: Lentil and Spinach Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large soup pot, add the lentils and salt to the water or broth.
Simmer for 30 minutes.
2. Meanwhile, sauté the onions and garlic until light brown.
3. When the lentils are done, add the onion and garlic and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
4. Add the remaining ingredients (potatoes, carrots, spinach, lemon juice, and coriander) and salt and pepper to taste.
Simmer until the potatoes and carrots are tender.
